1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul id="manual-list-wrap-ul"> <li class="archive-element"> <a aria-hidden="true" href="/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/nyheter/2025.4.4%20nr%202" tabindex="-1"> <div class="overlay"></div> <picture><source size
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

Link text is a URL

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/hva-skjer/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'streetsearch' appears 2 times

id="streetsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (31 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 title="Lenker tilhørende artikkel">Lenker</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/om-kirken/die-norwegische-kirche/"/>

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/kvinnenes%20internasjonale%20b%C3%B8nnedag/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'streetsearch' appears 2 times

id="streetsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="congregationsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="streetname"

SERIOUS

id="streetnumber"

SERIOUS

id="code"

SERIOUS

id="1472712"

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (27 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Kontakt </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Kontakt </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (162 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="this.href = 'mailto:' + 'oa228' + '@' + 'kirken.no'; this.innerText = 'oa228' + '@' + 'kirken.no'; this.o
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="footer-link" href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/cf0065e1-cc1b-4a33-adf0-5d66460e484c" rel="noopener noereferrer" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/sinnsro%20v%C3%A5r%202026/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 title="Last ned relevante dokumenter">Dokumenter</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

Frogner menighet - Frogner menighet

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/menigheter/frogner/
Avvik: 226 | Bestått: 183
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul id="manual-list-wrap-ul"> <li class="archive-element"> <a aria-hidden="true" href="/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/menigheter/frogner/oppslagstavle/2024.10.14%20mb%20nr%205" tabindex="-1"> <div class="overl
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

MODERATE

Link text is a URL

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Kontakt </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MODERATE

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="this.href = 'mailto:' + 'oa228' + '@' + 'kirken.no'; this.innerText = 'oa228' + '@' + 'kirken.no'; this.o
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="this.href = 'mailto:' + 'ms959' + '@' + 'kirken.no'; this.innerText = 'ms959' + '@' + 'kirken.no'; this.o
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="footer-link" href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/cf0065e1-cc1b-4a33-adf0-5d66460e484c" rel="noopener noereferrer" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/virksomhetsomrader/diakoni-og-omsorg/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Drop-in-bryllup 14. februar 2026 - Tranby og Lierskogen menighet

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/menigheter/tranby/drop-in-bryllup%2014.%20februar%202026
Avvik: 200 | Bestått: 101
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="" src="/img/no-photo.png" title="7018241"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="33" viewbox="0 0 32 33" width="32" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <g clip-path="url(#clip0_5802_5003)"> <path d="M22.667 9.34607H17.3337V12.0127H22.667C24.867 12.0127 26.

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#333" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="m256-200-56-56 224-224-224-224 56-56 224 224 224-224 56 56-224 224 224 224-56 56-224-2
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Kontakt </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="employee-title" itemprop="title"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/virksomhetsomrader/barn-og-unge/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (161 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)

CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

<input aria-label="F.eks. Dåp" autocomplete="off" class="search2024__input" id="search-box" js-autocomplete-type="inactive" js-phrase-search="1" js-type-search="" name="q" placeholder="F.eks. Dåp" req
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="styles2024-primary-button" style="margin-bottom:15px;" title="Søk" type="submit"> Søk <svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="2
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (2 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 2 pages]
Avvik: 20 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×10 across article pages)

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1 (×2 across article pages)

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4 (×2 across article pages)

<h4 title="Last ned relevante dokumenter">Dokumenter</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend (×2 across article pages)

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×2 across article pages)

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL (×134 across article pages)

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×162 across article pages)

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link) (×26 across article pages)

<a href="" target="_blank"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label (×2 across article pages)

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/lier/nyheter/2024.10.14%20mb%20nr%205"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible (×8 across article pages)

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order (×2 across article pages)

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation (×2 across article pages)

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

https://www.kirken.no/lier
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.kirken.no/lier --max-pages 15 --format html
